creator: grahamperrin@gmail.com
text:
Maybe coincidence, better below with iwlwifi(4) instead of iwm(4). 

This test ran before Firefox ran. 

In previous tests, I probably had Firefox running with (I believe) little or no network activity. 

root@mowa219-gjp4-zbook-freebsd:~ # fastest_pkg -v

Fastest:
pkg0.fra.freebsd.org: 2.9 MB/s


Write configuration:
mkdir -p /usr/local/etc/pkg/repos/
echo 'FreeBSD: { url: "http://pkg0.fra.freebsd.org/${ABI}/latest", mirror_type: "NONE" }' \
        > /usr/local/etc/pkg/repos/FreeBSD.conf


root@mowa219-gjp4-zbook-freebsd:~ # pkg iinfo fastest_pkg
py311-fastest_pkg-0.2.1_1
root@mowa219-gjp4-zbook-freebsd:~ #
